## Linked issue or discussion
<!-- Optional but recommended -->

## Summary
<!-- What docs were improved and why? -->

## Scope
- [ ] README
- [ ] Module/API usage docs
- [ ] Playground/example snippets
- [ ] Changelog/release notes (if applicable)

## Validation
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` (if code snippets/config changed)
- [ ] I ran `npm run test` (if examples/tests changed)
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:types` (if typed examples or public typings changed)

## Checklist
- [ ] Documentation is consistent with current Nuxt module behavior
- [ ] I added migration notes when there is a breaking or notable change
